comment: This is generated by ESQL's AbstractFunctionTestCase. Do not edit it. See ../README.md for how to regenerate it.
name: st_dimension
description:
Returns the topological dimension of the supplied geometry.
Points and multi-points return `0`, lines and multi-lines return `1`, polygons and multi-polygons return `2`, and geometry collections return the maximum dimension of their components.

params.name: geometry
params.description: Expression of type `geo_point`, `geo_shape`, `cartesian_point` or `cartesian_shape`. If `null`, the function returns `null`.

params.name: geometry
params.description: Expression of type `geo_point`, `geo_shape`, `cartesian_point` or `cartesian_shape`. If `null`, the function returns `null`.

params.name: geometry
params.description: Expression of type `geo_point`, `geo_shape`, `cartesian_point` or `cartesian_shape`. If `null`, the function returns `null`.

params.name: geometry
params.description: Expression of type `geo_point`, `geo_shape`, `cartesian_point` or `cartesian_shape`. If `null`, the function returns `null`.

examples:
ROW wkt = [
    "POINT(1.0 2.0)",
    "LINESTRING (30 10, 10 30, 40 40)",
    "POLYGON ((30 10, 40 40, 20 40, 10 20, 30 10))"]
| MV_EXPAND wkt
| EVAL geometry = TO_GEOSHAPE(wkt),
       type = ST_GEOMETRYTYPE(geometry),
       topological_dimension = ST_DIMENSION(geometry)
| KEEP type, topological_dimension
